answer: Cloud design is prepared for failure and measures the mean time to repair, while on-premises design is designed to avoid failures and measures the mean time between failures (MTBF).
The Azure landing zone pattern provides organization-wide governance and gives workload teams and architects democratized access to resources to fulfill localized business objectives.
Compute, data stores, messaging, and AI

The Cloud Adoption Framework for Azure is used to formalize an organization's Azure-wide adoption strategy, readiness, innovation, management, governance, and security initiatives, and to standardize a consistent approach across workloads.
